results.title: ‘Temporary Misconfiguration’: IIT Roorkee Calls JEE Advanced Data Breach Claims 'Misleading'
results.description: The affected storage, IIT Roorkee said, was “read-only" and access was limited to less than 0.05% of the data. No sensitive information was compromised or mass-extracted, it added.

results.title: ChatGPT app can now remember more about your conversations; Without a paid subscription
results.description: The new memory architecture is built on top of its "dreaming" system, which automatically identifies information from past conversations.

results.title: Gang 'selling' minor girls for marriage busted in Lucknow; three arrested
results.description: The Lucknow Police have made three arrests after busting an inter-state gang allegedly involved in luring minor girls under the pretence of offering help, only to "sell" them for marriage in Rajasthan, officials said.

results.title: 2 Masked Visitors, 30 Minutes: Probe Into Delhi Professor's Murder
results.description: Debosmita Paul was an Assistant Professor at Shivaji College, University of Delhi.

results.title: Minister Kollu Ravindra
results.description: పర్యావరణ పరిరక్షణ వేడుకల్లో మంత్రి కొల్లు రవీంద్ర పాల్గొన్నారు. ప్రతి పౌరుడు కనీసం ఒక మొక్క నాటి పరిరక్షించాలని కోరారు. పర్యావరణ సంరక్షణను ప్రతి ఒక్కరూ వ్యక్తిగత బాధ్యతగా తీసుకోవాలని మంత్రి తెలిపారు.

results.title: Gang 'Selling' Minor Girls For Marriage Busted In Lucknow; 3 arrested
results.description: Lucknow police dismantled an inter-state trafficking ring, arresting three suspects who targeted vulnerable minor girls to "sell" them into marriages in Rajasthan under the false pretense of assistance.

results.title: P!NK Promises 'Absolute Mayhem' As She Prepares To Host The 79th Tony Awards I N18G
results.description: Grammy-winning singer P!NK is ready to take on a brand-new challenge as host of the 79th Tony Awards. Speaking ahead of Broadway’s biggest night, P!NK revealed she never imagined herself hosting the ceremony and promised viewers 'seven and a half minutes of absolute mayhem' during the opening number. The singer also opened up about her family’s love for musical theater, joked that her daughter Willow may finally think she’s cool, and shared advice she received from Neil Patrick Harris. The 79th Tony Awards will air live on June 7, celebrating the best of Broadway with P!NK at the helm.
